code:
import io
import string

fn rot(_ b: Int) -> Int
  if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    ((b - 97 + 13) % 26) + 97
  else if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    ((b - 65 + 13) % 26) + 65
  else
    b
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(rot(b))}"
  i = i + 1
end

print(result)
